speaker: menschik
text: [a]ny further discussion on VAERS data mining methods/findings outside my chain of command will have to be offline and in general terms, as well as without reference to any specific VAERS [adverse events].
context: Menschik replied to Szarfman's email pressing for RGPS adoption, restricting how she could communicate further about VAERS data mining.
emphasis_words: [a]ny further discussion on VAERS data mining methods/findings outside my chain of command will have to be offline and in general terms
